linkedin.text: Most teams overthink the first step. You don't need a finished plan — you need a partner who's done this 200+ times. 🧭 In one free 30-minute call we'll pressure-test your destination shortlist, ballpark your budget per head, flag the dates that'll save you money, and tell you honestly what's realistic. No pitch deck, no obligation, just clarity you can take back to your boss. That's worth 30 minutes of anyone's week. ⏱️ Slots this week are limited — book yours via the link in bio or DM "CALL". #UproductionEvents #IncentiveTravel #CorporateEvents #EventPlanning #B2BEvents #EventStrategy #IncentiveTrip #EventProduction
